description: Phase 44 scan_thermodynamic_closure_manifest: config/thermodynamic_closure.json (R24+31 axis E3 manifest) must exist with required top-level keys {schema, closure_principle, monotone_atoms, closure_policy, semiring_extension}, at least 1 monotone atom, and every atom carrying {value, atlas_ref, direction, closure_predicate, enforced_by_phase} fields. Parallels P36 (invariants), P42 (silicon), and P43 (measurement). Gate: healthy == true.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_thermodynamic_closure_manifest.json ] && jq -r "if .healthy == true then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_thermodynamic_closure_manifest.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
